chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.D-03 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 01-02-2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G. ***** Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
